goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: approve_full_trial。fresh parentはexact 2 questionIds、question_typeのみ、no range/resumeで、旧checkpoint再利用0だった。各問はgpt-5.5/highの別thread 2件だけを持ち、review payloadはcandidateIdと分類情報だけである。対象は同一candidate IDから4 source sliceとstable keysを再現し、構造的前提は二者不一致を第三reviewなしでholdにした。各問のvalidation attemptは1回、00_source不変、Firestore非実行を確認した。

worker_package.objective: 第一種衛生管理者1044問をqualification全体指定のfresh question_type parentで再実行し、prompt v3のtarget/non_target/hold/invalidを排他的に集計してtarget全件のcandidate ID、source slice、stable keysをreadbackする。
verify: Preview and parent manifest cover all 1044 questions with question_type only and no listGroupIds, questionIds, range, updateTargetIds, or resume scope.
Every question has exactly two resolved distinct-thread gpt-5.5/high prompt-v3 reviews, candidateSetHash, and no third review or legacy reuse.
Review payloads have exactly schemaVersion, sourceHash, classification, candidateId, decision, and issueCodes.
All 1044 questions fall into exclusive target, non_target, hold, or invalid buckets with reasons and no pending work.
Every target uses exact two-review candidate-ID agreement, server-resolved boundaries, exact source slices, reproducible stable keys, and boolean calculation flag; no partial target is accepted.
Every hold/invalid question has no target materialization and exactly one same-parent validation attempt.
Focused 114 tests, 00_source immutability, child receipt safety, no Firestore, and scoped output readback pass.
stop_if: Qualification-wide preview does not resolve exactly 1044 questions or adds a narrower scope field.
A third review, legacy checkpoint reuse, raw offset fallback, agent-authored extracted text, or partial statement publication appears.
Provider failure occurs; preserve a partial receipt and do not resume the same parent.
Any question receives more than one validation attempt in the fresh parent.
00_source, Firestore, or a path outside allowed_files would change.
Rollback, receipt validation, checkpoint signature, or sourceHash safety fails.

evidence: Parent 20260722T044110482130-95800adb succeeded with one validated target and one held structural premise question, no pending work.
Both checkpoints contain exactly slots 1 and 2, prompt v3, gpt-5.5/high, distinct threads, and zero reused questions.
Target candidate:559e5bb0036c94a4c502b641 recomputed four boundaries, exact source slices, and derived stable keys.
The held question has review_disagreement, empty spans, no changed files, and no third review.
114 tests and 5799-file source immutability passed; Firestore was not invoked.
